purpose: Inventory official JRA source candidates after HKJC was paused in PR-145. This file is not a calendar input and does not promote JRA.

context.previous_path: HKJC paused at C after PR-145

fetch_status.observed_issue: Opening www.jra.go.jp pages returned a Unicode decoding error in the current web fetch environment.
fetch_status.inventory_scope: Candidate URLs and page roles only. Live verification must happen in a later PR.

official_source_candidates.expected_role: official JRA root site and navigation source
candidate official fixture calendar or schedule page
candidate JRA database entry point for race information pages
candidate racecard or entry-list route; exact query parameters must be discovered later
candidate result or race detail route that may expose race time after the event; exact role must be verified later

required_next_verification: Confirm which official JRA page lists fixture dates for June 2026.
Confirm whether an official JRA page lists all races for one meeting.
Confirm whether each race row exposes race_number and race_time.
Discover any required query parameters for date, racecourse, meeting number, or race number.
Record only source URL, route pattern, race_number, race_time, and status metadata in later inspection results.

forward_schedule.goal: Define exact live checks and output schema for JRA official pages.
Record whether one JRA meeting can expose complete race time rows.
If one meeting is verified, create a snapshot from verified rows.
If one meeting is not verified, pause JRA and start NAR inventory.
If one meeting is verified, test wider coverage before any promotion.

forward_schedule.topic: JRA wider snapshot or no-promotion status
forward_schedule.goal: Create wider data only if source coverage is complete.
Promote JRA only if PR-132 rank rules are satisfied.
